# Scale Microgrids

**Category:** Generators and Microgrids, Sustainability and Energy Strategy
**Website:** https://www.scalemicrogrids.com/

## Headline
Microgrid platform relevant to resilient power, energy strategy, and utility-constrained data center growth.

## Overview
Scale Microgrids helps the market map extend into energy strategy and resilient power planning. This is especially relevant for buyers who have land or demand but not easy utility certainty, and need an alternative path to reliable capacity.

## Key capabilities
- microgrid development
- behind-the-meter resilience planning
- energy strategy for constrained sites

## Best fit for
- buyers facing utility bottlenecks
- teams exploring distributed energy for data centers
- projects where resilience and speed-to-power both matter
